name: Blood, Sweat, and Tears
descs:
Skills deal +10% damage to Staggered enemies.

If the Skill inflicts Tremor Potency, Tremor Count, triggers Amplitude Conversion, Tremor Burst, or Amplitude Entanglement, or if the Skill's Affinity was Sloth, deal +20% damage instead.

Skills deal +12.5% damage to Staggered enemies.

If the Skill inflicts Tremor Potency, Tremor Count, triggers Amplitude Conversion, Tremor Burst, or Amplitude Entanglement, or if the Skill's Affinity was Sloth, deal +25% damage instead.

Skills deal +15% damage to Staggered enemies.

If the Skill inflicts Tremor Potency, Tremor Count, triggers Amplitude Conversion, Tremor Burst, or Amplitude Entanglement, or if the Skill's Affinity was Sloth, deal +30% damage instead.
